title: Action Inventory Mod
description: Allows creation of special inventories that do things when items are clicked
body:
## *** Development of this mod is on hold for the foreseeable future. ***

*Works with servers and in singleplayer worlds*  
***
This mod allows the creation of action inventories which are special inventories that do certain things when items are clicked.  
Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/RealMegaMinds/ActionInventoryMod/wiki) for information on how to create them.

Supports [PlaceHolderApi](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/) (3.4.0+)
* Inventory titles
* Inventory item name and lore (full nbt in 3.5.0+)
* GiveAction items
* Messages and commands
